'''Dog Plushie''' is a dyable placeable entity for you and your dog to hug to sleep. 
{{Item
| image = dog_plushie_toy_item.png
| id = dog_plushie_toy_item
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 1
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| White Wool <br> + String <br> + Gray Wool <br> + [[Wool Collar]] <br> + [[Training Treat]] <br> 
| [[File:dog_plushie_toy_item_crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
* <code>Right click</code> to place the item down.

== Trivia ==
* It was introduced in DTN 1.18.5.
* Fun fact: DashieDev has 2 of them on his bed.
